[CSRW 6-8 APRIL 2026]

We are looking for players for the upcoming season. Experience isn't a requirement, but commitment is. Whether you’ve played for years or are looking to start, we have a place for you in the squad.

(Open for both men and women)

Location: Central Learning Complex (CLC 6)
Time: 10.00AM - 4.00PM

RUN | BLEED | LIVE

Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri 🌙✨

On this blessed occasion, we at MMU Hornbills would like to wish everyone celebrating a joyful Hari Raya Aidilfitri. May this Syawal bring happiness, blessings, and strengthen the bonds between us all.

Thank you for your continuous support, may we keep growing stronger together and achieve even greater success, both on and off the field. 💚🏉

Maaf Zahir & Batin.
